rows.notes: Visual verification confirms amounts are 749£ 0s 4½d; `gemini-flash` correctly read the numerical value. The description is simply a dash '—', as seen in `gpt-5-mini`, since '(600£ paid before)' is an annotation for the preceding entry (Row 34), not the total.
